title: thermopsis mollis
intro: Thermopsis mollis, also known as mountain or rocky mountain goldenseal, is a perennial herb native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its content of isothiocyanates and saponins. The health benefits of Thermopsis mollis include its potential to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne. Herbal preparations of Thermopsis mollis can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
